description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 18 hrs 38 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 6 mins per day. His activity was spread across 5 projects, with most time in Java, followed by Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repos are listed in the provided data.
